description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a geometric, multi-level facade with a mix of tan brick and dark gray paneling. Large, rectangular windows dominate the exterior, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The front area includes a covered patio with outdoor seating, a fire pit, and a pool with adjacent lounge chairs, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. The structure is composed of several interconnected volumes, creating a dynamic and visually interesting profile. The rear and side views reveal additional rooms and open terraces, with a garage visible on one end. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with tan brick and dark gray paneling, featuring large windows, a pool, and outdoor living spaces. The design is geometric and contemporary with multiple interconnected volumes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered patio, pool, lounge area, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the structure, garage, and the arrangement of rooms and terraces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, terraces, and the geometric layout of the building volumes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, outdoor seating, and the layered arrangement of the bungalow's sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
